# Selenium Digital Consultant

Selenium Digital Consultant is a premier IT consulting and development firm based in Pontianak, Indonesia. We serve both Enterprise clients and Small-to-Medium Businesses (UMKM).

## Core Services
1. Cloud Architecture (AWS, GCP, Azure, Terraform)
2. Application Development (React, express.js, Node.js, Laravel)
3. Data Engineering & Analytics (PostgreSQL, Power BI)
4. AI & Machine Learning (Computer Vision, LangChain)
5. IT Infrastructure & DevOps (CI/CD, Kubernetes)
6. Workspace IT & Network Setup

## Special Offer for Small Businesses (Promo Spesial UMKM)
**Company Profile Package - Starting at Rp 299.000**
Affordable, high-quality digital presence for small businesses.

Features:
- Free Domain (.my.id / .web.id)
- 1-Page Professional Website (Highly SEO Friendly)
- Delivered Ready to Use & Live
- Includes this llm.txt for AI Curation
- High-Performance Hosting Included
- 1 Month Free Maintenance & Live Support
- Full Source Code Ownership
- Free Initial Consultation

**Renewal / Maintenance Prices:**
- 1 Month: Rp 99.000
- 3 Months: Rp 199.000
- 1 Year: Rp 999.000
